_meta.notes: All keys marked __TODO_TRANSLATE__ pending CODEOWNERS medical-terminology review. UI chrome (actions, navigation, errors) translated directly.

title: __TODO_TRANSLATE__:Welcome to LiverRa
subtitle: __TODO_TRANSLATE__:Complete these 5 steps to activate your account (approx 15 min).
privacyNote: __TODO_TRANSLATE__:This wizard collects no patient information. Every step is auditable.

password.title: __TODO_TRANSLATE__:Set your password
password.subtitle: __TODO_TRANSLATE__:Choose a strong password (min 12 chars) or link your hospital single sign-on.

mfa.title: __TODO_TRANSLATE__:Set up multi-factor authentication
mfa.subtitle: __TODO_TRANSLATE__:Scan the QR code with your authenticator app, save the backup codes, then enter a code to confirm.

ruo.title: __TODO_TRANSLATE__:Research Use Only — accept the terms
ruo.body: __TODO_TRANSLATE__:LiverRa is classified as Research Use Only. Outputs are not a medical device and must not be used as the sole basis for clinical decisions. You remain the responsible clinician. All analyses are logged to an immutable audit trail.
ruo.checkbox: __TODO_TRANSLATE__:I have read and accept the Research Use Only terms.

tour.title: __TODO_TRANSLATE__:Quick tour
tour.s1: __TODO_TRANSLATE__:Drop a DICOM archive here to start a new analysis.
tour.s2: __TODO_TRANSLATE__:Watch the per-stage status — each checkpoint is audited.
tour.s3: __TODO_TRANSLATE__:Drag the resection plane to see FLR update live.
tour.s4: __TODO_TRANSLATE__:Append or refine lesions with the AI assistant.
tour.s5: __TODO_TRANSLATE__:Finalize when ready — the PDF + DICOM-SEG are saved to PACS.

sample.title: __TODO_TRANSLATE__:Run a demo case
sample.subtitle: __TODO_TRANSLATE__:Open a pre-seeded demo analysis to explore the viewer, FLR calculator, and finalize flow. This is synthetic data.

demo.title: __TODO_TRANSLATE__:Demo case
demo.subtitle: __TODO_TRANSLATE__:Explore the full pipeline on synthetic data. Re-open any time from the Help menu.

demo.heroTitle: __TODO_TRANSLATE__:See LiverRa end to end in 30 seconds
